name: pangolin
description: A self-hosted tunneled reverse proxy server with identity and access control

scripts.db:backup:auto: npm run db:backup:all && npm run db:backup:clean

_note: Personal fork for learning purposes. Upstream: https://github.com/fosrl/pangolin

_notes.db:backup:ts: Use db:backup:ts instead of db:backup to get a timestamped backup file
_notes.db:backup:all: Like db:backup:ts but stores backups in db/backups/ directory to keep things tidy
_notes.db:backup:clean: Deletes backups older than 3 days from db/backups/ — tightened from 7 days since my VPS is really cramped for space
_notes.db:backup:count: Quick sanity check to see how many backup files are sitting in db/backups/ before running clean
_notes.db:backup:size: Check total disk usage of the backups folder — handy on my small VPS to make sure things aren't getting out of hand
_notes.db:backup:auto: Convenience script: runs backup:all then backup:clean in one shot — useful to call from a cron job
